content: Official MoonBit docs and local moon 0.1.20260713 agree: moon login stores an API token in ~/.moon/credentials.json; moon whoami reports login status; moon package --frozen --list builds a candidate; moon publish --frozen publishes the current module; moon update refreshes the index; moon add owner/module@version writes a registry dependency. No official noninteractive token environment variable or Mooncakes OIDC trusted-publishing mechanism was found, so CI authentication remains an implementation-time gap.
